hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "=== Sunrise Tennis Codebase State ==="; echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current)"; echo "Last 3 commits:"; git log --oneline -3; echo "Migrations: $(ls supabase/migrations/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l) files"; echo "Routes: $(find src/app -name page.tsx 2>/dev/null | wc -l) pages"; echo "Uncommitted: $(git status --porcelain | wc -l) files"'
